CREATE TABLE test_rand (id UInt32, value UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_rand SELECT number, rand() FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100;
SELECT id, value FROM test_rand WHERE value < 1000 ORDER BY rand();
SELECT id, rand() as random_value FROM (SELECT id FROM test_rand ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 10);
SELECT rand() AS random_val FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_rand WHERE id % 2 = 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE random_data AS SELECT number AS id, rand() AS rand_val FROM system.numbers LIMIT 50;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(rand_val) FROM random_data WHERE rand_val > 5000000000;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_rand) AS total_count SELECT rand() AS random_num, total_count FROM system.one;
SELECT MAX(value), rand() AS random_value FROM test_rand GROUP BY id HAVING random_value < 2000000000;
INSERT INTO test_rand (id, value) SELECT number, rand() FROM system.numbers LIMIT 200;
SELECT id, value FROM test_rand WHERE value IN (SELECT rand() FROM system.numbers LIMIT 5);
SELECT id, (value + rand()) AS manipulated_value FROM test_rand ORDER BY manipulated_value DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, value, (CASE WHEN value > 500 THEN rand() ELSE 0 END) AS random_case_value FROM test_rand;
